chosen_approach: Two-track cleanup: (1) Code and reference cleanup — fix evolution.ts cwd bug (2 call sites), remove v3 no-op functions, eliminate stale fallbacks, remove duplicate readInputData, fix stale skill references (/pivot-protocol -> /geas:vote-round), document hybrid naming convention in CLAUDE.md. (2) Release restructure — flatten 8 existing git tags to v0.x.y, set plugin version to v0.5.1, bump protocol INDEX to v1, create CHANGELOG.md.
non_goals: Korean documentation sync (except INDEX.md v1 update)
verification_strategy: After all changes: (1) npm run typecheck passes, (2) node test/integration.js passes, (3) git tag --list shows only v0.x.y tags, (4) plugin.json and marketplace.json versions match at v0.5.1, (5) CHANGELOG.md exists with complete history.

alternatives_considered.approach: Rename all agent files to underscores
alternatives_considered.rejected_reason: Hyphens are the standard for agent filenames. Hybrid convention is correct.
Code cleanup and release have different risk profiles.

architecture_decisions.rationale: Both are already correct. Only inconsistent references need fixing.

architecture_decisions.decision: Plugin version v0.5.1 for current HEAD

risks.mitigation: Verify commit SHAs before push. User confirms.

unresolved_assumptions: No contributors depend on current tags

design_review.summary: Approved. Simplified from 3 to 2 tracks after user adopted hybrid naming convention.
additions: evolution.ts cwd bug at both line 42 and 86
evidence-gate line 270 same stale pivot reference

rejection_history.reason: User reconsidered naming convention. Hyphens are standard for files.
rejection_history.revision_summary: Removed file rename track. 3 tracks to 2. Hybrid naming documented.
